description_long: This object is a large, mounted rifle system with a long, cylindrical barrel extending horizontally across a robust mechanical base. The base is circular and appears to be designed for stability, with four sturdy legs and a central housing that likely contains operational controls and mechanisms. The rifle features several mounting brackets and adjustment knobs along the barrel, suggesting it is engineered for precision targeting and possibly for use as an anti-materiel or heavy sniper weapon. There are visible sighting devices and adjustment levers on the top and side, indicating manual aiming and calibration capabilities. The construction is predominantly metallic, with a matte finish and some darker components, possibly for grip or insulation. The overall design is industrial and utilitarian, suitable for fixed defensive positions or specialized urban security roles.
description: A large, mounted rifle system with a long barrel, robust mechanical base, and multiple adjustment features, designed for precision targeting. The construction is metallic with a matte finish and industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the barrel, central housing, and symmetrical mounting brackets.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the base, sighting devices, and adjustment levers on the upper section.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the housing and the alignment of the barrel with mounting points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional adjustment mechanisms and the profile of the base.
